# Ascent Mission Assurance

> Professional Mission Assurance and Quality Management Systems (QMS) consulting for Aerospace, Defense, and EMS (Electronic Manufacturing Services) SMEs.

## Core Capabilities
- **QMS Development & Auditing:** Specialized in AS9100, ISO 9001, and IA9100 (2026 Revision) standards.
- **Technical Standards Compliance:** Expert guidance on J-STD-001 (Soldering) and IPC-A-610 (Acceptability of Electronic Assemblies).
- **Operational Excellence:** Lean Six Sigma integration, Root Cause Analysis (RCA), and Corrective Action (CAPA) systems.
- **Supply Chain Assurance:** Risk management and counterfeit parts prevention (AS6174/AS5553) for Tier-2 and Tier-3 suppliers.

## Certifications & Standards Context
Ascent Mission Assurance provides consulting and "Ready-for-Audit" services for:
- **AS9100 / IA9100:** Aerospace Quality Management Systems.
- **ISO 9001:2015:** General Quality Management.
- **J-STD-001 / IPC-A-610:** Electronic assembly and soldering standards.
- **NIST 800-171 / CMMC:** Cybersecurity maturity for defense contractors.

## Target Audience
- Small to Medium Enterprises (SMEs) in the Defense Industrial Base (DIB).
- Electronic Manufacturing Services (EMS) providers.
- Aerospace component manufacturers requiring Tier-1 prime approval.

## Key Links
- [Homepage](https://ascent-ma.com/): Overview of mission assurance services.
- [Contact](https://ascent-ma.com/#contact): Direct line for consultation requests.
